description: Create a data transformation channel in NextGen Connect named 'Vitals_Flattener' to flatten hierarchical HL7 vital signs data into a CSV format for research analytics. The channel must listen on TCP port 6661 for HL7 v2.x ORU^R01 messages. Extract PatientID (PID.3.1), ObservationTime (OBR.7), and vital signs from OBX segments based on LOINC codes: Heart Rate (8867-4), Systolic BP (8480-6), Diastolic BP (8462-4), and Oxygen Saturation (2708-6). Append the data to /tmp/research_data/vitals.csv using the format PatientID,ObservationTime,HeartRate,SystolicBP,DiastolicBP,SpO2 (no header). If a vital is missing, the field must be empty. Ignore OBX segments with other LOINC codes and ensure the output directory is created if it doesn't exist. A sample HL7 message is provided at /home/ga/sample_vitals.hl7.
